titleStmt.title: SII 24.33: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 33. (A.R. No. 137 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Records a sale of land to Araiyaṉ Sēndaṉ alias Rājēndrachōḻa Adiyamāṉ of Poṉpaṟṟi in Tirumiḻalaik-kūṟṟam for a garden to supply garlands of specified flowers to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Damaged and lost.nantavanattukku veṇṭum paṇiceytu kamukum palāvum Uḷḷiṭṭa maram Iṭṭākki ceṇpatamum catapattiyum karumukaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruppūmaramum Iṭṭākki nittamumDamaged and lost.tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṇimāṟakkaTavarkaḷAkavum IppaTi Ittiru nantavanam ceytu velai ceyyutu Anupavikka kaTavarkaḷAkavum Ivveli ceyyum
2 The begining of the inscription is damaged and peeled off. ikkaṭamai aṭṭi ippaṭi anupavikkumiṭattu itu vallatu innilattukku iṟaiyum veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai onṟum ceyyakaṭavuta-

llātu Ākavum kāverikkulaiyum cennir veṭṭiyum ceyyak kaṭavānākavum Ippaṭikkuc cantirātittaval Ivviṭai Ivvaṇṇame niṟkak kaṭavitāka Aṭuttuk kuṭut tom rājarājap pāṇṭi nāṭṭu rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirumiḻalaik kūṟṟattu ponpaṟṟiyuṭaiyān Arayan centanāna rājentracoḻa Atiyamānukku Āḻ vār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku mutal kaṇakku Uṟaiyūr Uṭaiyan tiruvāṉaikkāvan periyān karuṇākarappiriyan Eḻuttu śrīvai
yiṣṇavakkaṇakku mayilāppuṭaiyān veṅkaṭavan tiruvākkulamuṭaiyān neḻuttu śrīvayiṣṇavāriyam Eṭṭukkūr tirunāṭuṭaiyān Eḻuttu perumpuliyūr cakrapāṇi Eḻuttu śrīcaṭakopadāsar Eḻuttu tiruvākkulamuṭaiyān neḻuttu nārāyaṇan Eḻuttu tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Eḻuttu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷadāsar Eḻuttu makiḻalaṅkāṟa dāsar Eḻuttu tirukkaḻakaṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu paḷḷikoṇṭān Eḻuttu śrīpaṇṭāra vāriyam cirākavan neḻuttu Ārāvamutin neḻuttu taniyiḷañciṅkattin neḻuttu
Eḻuttu śrīkṛṣṇan Eḻuttu cirāman Eḻuttu tiruveṅkaṭattin Eḻuttu Eḻuttu Itu śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 24.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
